abuse_cases.expected: Trust State, Top 3 or stale reason, next safe action, recompute action all visible without scrolling
abuse_cases.actual: Overview top-down: Trust Pulse → Flowchart → Top 3 (with recompute_command on stale) → Leverage Queue → Explain (next safe action). Tests pin each surface.

abuse_cases.expected: Operator can complete the same scan on a 390px viewport
abuse_cases.actual: Overview uses p-3 / sm:p-6, vertical stack, max-w-full overflow-x-hidden; Graph tab adds Fit / Scroll toggle; canvas-mode-toggle test pinned

abuse_cases.expected: Trust Pulse shows 'Blocked' / 'Frozen' label, not internal *_signal
abuse_cases.actual: humanTrustState maps blocked_signal → Blocked / freeze_signal → Frozen; tested in humanStateLabels.test.ts and OperatorComplexityBudget.test.tsx

abuse_cases.expected: Top 3 cards do not render as actionable; warning + recompute command visible
abuse_cases.actual: Tested by 'stale priority artifact does NOT render Top 3 cards as actionable' and 'missing-generated_at priority artifact does NOT render Top 3 cards'

abuse_cases.expected: Diagnostics tab shows 'OC unavailable' instead of fabricating a card; core dashboard still works
abuse_cases.actual: Tested by 'diagnostics tab surfaces oc-bottleneck unavailable when OC artifact is missing'
